title: 示例自动化案例
summary: 这是一个用于生成静态案例页面的简短摘要。
author: 13ASRS
seoDescription: 由本地生成器创建的静态案例页面。
challenge: Customer needed higher storage density, lower labor dependency, and more accurate inventory control.
solutionDetail: 13ASRS designed an automated warehouse system with stacker cranes, conveyors, and WMS integration.
layoutWorkflow: Inbound pallets are scanned, conveyed to storage, retrieved by WMS orders, and dispatched through outbound lanes.
contentHtml:
